sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5980" key="a)mfipa/tores" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιπάτορες</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n5980.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">brothers</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sisters by different fathers</tr_> but the same mother, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμφιμήτορες.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
